prompt: Create a 1:1 square rounded app icon logo featuring Lumi, a cute arctic fox mascot, in a soft anime cartoon style. Reference style: modern mascot app icons with a character peeking from the lower-right corner, oversized cute face, simple bold silhouette, glossy 2.5D polish, clean rounded-square tile, high readability at tiny sizes. Composition: Lumi is a white and cream arctic fox half-body in the lower-right corner, occupying 50-62% of the canvas, visible head, fluffy cheeks, small paws, rounded ears, tiny black nose, bright friendly eyes, subtle pink cheeks. Background: sea-salt cheese palette only, #C2DEF5, #FAFADB, #73B4E9, #3A86C5, soft cream-blue gradient, no letters, no P mark, no symbol mark, no text. Style: fresh, gentle, elegant, clean, cute but not noisy; crisp edges, soft shadow, light/dark mode recognizable. Constraints: no words, no watermark, no typography, no chip, no semiconductor, no circuit board, no black corner artifacts, no heavy outline, no realistic fur, no busy scenery.

Create a 1:1 square rounded app icon logo featuring Lumi, a cute arctic fox mascot, in a playful anime cartoon style. Reference style: cute character app icons with a tilted face entering from one corner, clean rounded-square tile, bright but soft colors, polished 2.5D gradients. Palette: sea-salt cheese #C2DEF5, #FAFADB, #73B4E9, #3A86C5, white and cream fur, tiny dark facial accents, small blush. Background: simple cream-blue tile with a curved wave of sky blue and pale cream, no text, no P letter, no other letterforms. Clean, elegant, fresh, designed for 16px readability and light/dark mode contrast. Avoid words, watermark, chip, semiconductor, circuit motifs, black border, black corner artifacts, realistic fur, busy scenery.

Create a 1:1 square rounded app icon logo featuring Lumi, a cute arctic fox mascot, in a soft anime badge style. Reference style: clean polished app icons with an adorable character, simple graphic background, tiny star accent, rounded shapes, 2.5D soft lighting. Composition: Lumi sits in the lower-right as a half-body mascot, 48-58% of canvas, with fluffy white cheeks, rounded ears, small paws, friendly bright eyes, tiny nose, blush, and a calm elegant smile. Background: sea-salt cheese palette #C2DEF5, #FAFADB, #73B4E9, #3A86C5; use a soft circular glow or cream-blue badge behind the mascot, but do not create letters or a P-shaped mark.
